results.title: RR vs GT, IPL 2026 Qualifier 2: Can Gujarat Titans crack the Vaibhav Sooryavanshi code?
results.description: Qualifier 2 pits Gujarat Titans' disciplined bowling against Rajasthan Royals' explosive opener Vaibhav Sooryavanshi. After a tough outing against RCB, GT's pacers, including Siraj and Rabada, face the challenge of containing the teenager who has redefined the tournament's emotional tempo with his aggressive batting.
